name: EXODUS: THE RISE OF CHAOS
short_description: You wake up trapped in your own mind, a mental prison filled with fears and distorted memories. To survive and understand the true nature of a Global Apocalypse, you must first confront the inner demons that haunt you.
detailed_description:
WARNING: This game may be disturbing to some audiences as it contains images, sounds, jump scares, extreme violence, and intense horror. Play this game at your own risk.

EXODUS: Dive into a world where the sun, once a source of life, has become humanity's executioner. After a devastating solar explosion, Earth has been transformed into an apocalyptic wasteland. You need to investigate what really happened to the world, but to survive and understand the true nature of the catastrophe, you must first confront the inner demons that haunt you. Each step is a battle against madness as you try to escape this mental prison and face the devastated reality.

Explore, investigate and discover a way to wake up.



NOTE: Exodus is a horror game set in an apocalyptic world being developed by a single developer. I will be updating the game soon, continuing the story and revealing more secrets of Exodus.
